IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (51769822.pdf)
SUMMARY: Energetic Administrative Assistant with 30+ years experience in high-level executive support roles. Organized and professional, excels at prioritizing, completing multiple tasks simultaneously and following through to achieve project goals.
SKILLS: Administration/Accounting/HR, Office support: Accounting, billing, bookkeeping, customer service, employee relations, filing, hiring, HR, Inventory, invoicing, Marketing, meetings, Excel, Outlook, Windows, Word, Payroll, PR, proposals, Purchasing, Real Estate, Sales Management, spreadsheets, supervisor, training programs, Translations, written communication
